title: Monocheesium's SixSeven Client
description: Pretty, Performant, Playable, and entirely based on a meme that died on arrival.
body:
# SixSeven
A modpack pretending to be a client, cherry-picked to make the game what is — in my opinion — more playable through:
- The _usual Performance-Improving Mods_, to make the game run half-decently, including:
  - Sodium
  - Lithium
  - Distant Horizons (assuming your render distance compensates for it)
- Quality of Life mods, like:
  - Plasmo Voice for proximity chat, as, _unlike another mod_, it's under a free license
  - Health bars, as it's inconvenient to f3 mid-fight
  - Mod Menu, because it's the only central way to configure things graphically
- Visual Mods, most prominently:
  - Iris, in case you want shaders
    - **To Do:** Bundle some
  - LambdaBetterGrass, which only _slightly_ conflicts with DH
- Pre-Configuration, which I should _probably_ not overwrite the user options with every release...
  - _Future Me Problem_
- Lots of branding, so you don't forget you're playing a modpack

- It's also named after [A Meme](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/6-7_(meme)), which isn't even funny anymore, but ima just drag it along for the next decade.

Not sure if actually kitchen sink but it's definitely just mods I need myself.

(Please note, the stuff **I** wrote is MIT. The actual mods themselves...not so much)
